mainEntity.name: Does firm size affect ChatGPT recommendations in Houston?
mainEntity.text: Does firm size affect ChatGPT recommendations in Houston?

acceptedAnswer.text: Larger Houston firms get more recommendations due to authority signals, but solo practitioners win with niche rankings.

suggestedAnswer.text: Size correlates with backlinks. Compensate via specialization.
